content:
Honestly, it's been surreal to see gacha is finally piercing through the western gaming sphere.

First time making salsa by myself and already loss a blade <:dead:1356082627509092372> Yes that is indeed a plate no I ran out of bowls and is too lazy to clean them
End up with too much onion but nothing an avocado couldn’t fix and turn it to guacamole
this weekend ill send you instruction on how to make good tuco/salsa. recipe from my grandma, she may rest in peace <:pray:1356053116260454534>
I was missing quite a bit of the ingredient but I make do. Brown onion, tomato, some garlic and cumin + lemon juice alongside some salt, sugar and pepper

how do u manage to make a blade missing
She just happy that the food processor is getting some use cuz it been collecting dust for a while
Although she had to help me search the kitchen and even the bins in case I accidentally dump it alongside the rest of the stuff
So now there’s one blade missing in 1/2
my mom would give the bombastic side eyes
Oh this one she already did
Genuine recommendation. If you're not familiar with Rigel Theatre yet it's not too late
